programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran joins C.C. on the jury of a controversial case.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver explains why America’s bail system is better for the reality TV industry than it is for the justice system.

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: A pair of aliens arrive on Earth to prepare for invasion, but crash instead. With enormous cone-shaped heads, robotlike walks and an appetite for toilet paper, aliens Beldar and Prymatt don't exactly blend in with the population of Paramus, N.J. But for some reason, everyone believes them when they say they're from France.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares
programme.desc: What's happened since the last time Gordon was here?

programme.title: Brain Games
programme.desc: Seeing is believing, right? Not necessarily. It all depends on your perspective. In this episode of Brain Games, mind-bending illusions will show you the ways in which your visual perceptions can be surprisingly off.
